---
title: "help_page_6"
author: "Edward"
date: "2026-03-04"
output: html_document
---

<div style="color:green; ">
Need Additional Help?
</div>

- Visit the **About** tab for project team information
- Check the **Code** tab to view source code on GitHub
- Contact via [akredw001@myuct.ac.za](mailto:akredw001@myuct.ac.za) or [akuruguedward@gmail.com](mailto:akuruguedward@gmail.com)



<div style="color:green; ">
Data Sources:
</div>

- **Ghana Health Service / NMEP** (malaria surveillance data — <span style="color:green;">**_Available upon request_**</span>)
- **Ghana Meteorological Agency** (climate data — <span style="color:green;">**_Available upon request_**</span>)
- **GADM Database** (administrative boundaries — <span style="color:green;">**_Publicly available_**</span>)
---
